about-me-p1: Hi, my name's Matías Pendino and I'm 22 years old. I'm from Rosario (Argentina), but current am living in Australia.
about-me-p2: I always liked software, so in 2017 I started to study by my own. In 2020, decided to enroll in the Bachelor of Software Development, which I finished in December 2022.
about-me-p3: Currently I specialize in web development, working with Django/DRF and MySQL in the backend, and React/Next in the frontend. I also have experience working with WordPress, building e-commerce, LMS, landing pages and business websites.
experience-muchticket-i1: Development of new features in the system.
experience-muchticket-i2: Integration of several payment methods as CyberSource, PayPal, SiemprePago, PlusPagos, and others.
experience-muchticket-i3: Use of technologies as Django, Django REST Framework, MySQL, JQuery, HTML, CSS, JavaScript, Bootstrap, Git and Gitea.
experience-freelance-i1: Design and developmemt of e-commerce, Learning Management Systems, landing pages and business websites.
experience-freelance-i2: Bug fixer in WordPress and Django projects.
experience-freelance-i3: Use of several tools as Figma, Notion, Photoshop and Slack.
experience-litoral-i1: Control and stock entry in the website.
experience-litoral-i2: Site maintenance. Downloading, setting up and updating of several plugins.
experience-litoral-i3: Aesthetic improvements and optimizations in the website. Design and development of new pages and sections.
